headline: Open VSX Registry surpasses 300 million monthly downloads, as industry leaders back critical developer infrastructure
summary: Amazon and Cursor support investments in supply chain security, multi-region infrastructure, and long-term sustainabilityBRUSSELS, March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Eclipse Foundation today announced major security and infrastructure advancements to the Open VSX Registry as it surpasses 300 million downloads per month, underscoring its role as critical infrastructure for AI-native and cloud-based development platforms. headline: IBM Expands AI And Government Ties As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) has secured a multi-year contract with the Defense Commissary Agency to modernize global in-store pricing displays across its commissary network. The company is also launching its first voice AI partnership, integrating Deepgram’s enterprise speech-to-text technology into Watsonx Orchestrate. These developments expand IBM’s role in public sector retail infrastructure and AI-driven workflow automation for enterprise clients. For investors watching IBM (NYSE:IBM), these moves...
